title: Sales Executive (Shipping Industry | 5-Day Work Week)
description:
Key Responsibilities:

Sales & Business Development

  • Identify and develop new business opportunities through prospecting, networking, cold calling, and sales visits.
  • Actively perform a hunter sales role by seeking out and acquiring new clients.
  • Deliver effective and compelling sales pitches to potential customers.
  • Consistently achieve sales targets aligned with management's expectations.

Price & Contract Negotiations

  • Participate in contract discussions and price negotiations with clients.
  • Offer competitive and cost-effective solutions tailored to client needs.
  • Strive to provide the best customer experience and maintain professional standards throughout the negotiation process.

Client Relationship Management

  • Build and nurture strong, long-term relationships with clients.
  • Understand clients' needs and requirements to ensure a high level of satisfaction.
  • Manage client expectations and address inquiries in a timely and professional manner.
  • Ensure a smooth post-sales process and maintain excellent after-sales support.

Collaboration & Internal Coordination

  • Work closely with internal departments such as Operations, Accounts, and Customer Service to fulfill client requirements and meet targets.
  • Coordinate effectively across teams to ensure seamless service delivery and problem resolution.

What we're looking for

  • 1 years of sales experience preferred
  • Candidates without experience are also welcome to apply
  • Committed, proactive and self-motivated.
  • Excellent interpersonal, negotiation and communication skills.
  • Working experience in the freight forwarding industry will be a plus point.
  • Able to start as soon as possible.

What we offer

We are committed to creating a supportive and inclusive work environment that empowers our employees to thrive. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:

  • Comprehensive Benefits
  • Attractive Commission & Allowance
  • Training & Sales Leads Provided
  • Opportunities for professional development and career advancement
  • Team-building events and social activities to foster a strong company culture

postedCompany.description:
PENANSHIN SHIPPING PTE LTD

Penanshin Shipping is a one-stop freight forwarding services company for customers who require services like freight forwarding, custom clearance, warehousing distribution, transportation, door to door services, household effects, projects shipments, exhibition clearance, etc. With overseas offices in Thailand, Malaysia and Hong Kong, and Philippines, Penanshin Shipping is positioned to be a major player in the regional market and strives to provide our customers with excellent services.
postedCompany.name: PENANSHIN SHIPPING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
